X

eRefunds

eRefunds puts money in your account… FAST!

No more trips to your financial institution or waiting for a paper check to come in the mail. Direct Deposit is the secure and convenient way to get your refund.

Setup Your eRefund Profile

  • I am a...
  • Apply now

We are here to help.

The Office of the Bursar manages student accounts, billing, and payment processing. Submit a ticket for dedicated assistance.

Please review the options below and their associated Knowledge Base (KB) articles. If the articles do not resolve your inquiry, please submit a ticket for the relevant service area.

Refund Request

Request a student refund or check status.

Read Knowledge Article Submit Ticket

Third Party Payment

Submit sponsor vouchers or letters of credit.

Read Knowledge Article Submit Ticket

Payment Plans

Enroll in a plan or troubleshoot issues.

Read Knowledge Article Submit Ticket

Tuition Fee Assessment

Understand bill breakdowns and appeal fees.

Read Knowledge Article Submit Ticket

For any other queries please use below emails

Email Directory

  • General Inquiries: bursar@njit.edu
  • Health Insurance: healthinsurance@njit.edu
  • Third Party: thirdparty@njit.edu
  • Payment Issues: payment@njit.edu
  • Collections: collections@njit.edu

For Collection Agencies list, please click here.

Contact Information

Mailing Address

New Jersey Institute of Technology
323 Dr. Martin Luther King Blvd
Student Mall-Office of the Bursar
Newark, NJ 07102

Phone

973-596-2877

Office Hours

Normal Office Hours

Monday - Friday: 8:30am - 4:30pm

Summer Hours (May 19 - August 15)

Monday - Thursday: 8:30am - 5:00pm

* During summer holiday weeks, our office times are 9:00 am - 4:00 pm

Action Required

Please read the Knowledge Base article first. It might resolve your inquiry quickly before you need to submit a ticket!
